description:
Create a SIPOC diagram for a 'Help Desk Ticket Resolution' process titled 'Help Desk Resolution SIPOC'. The diagram should include five columns (Suppliers, Inputs, Process, Outputs, Customers) with the following content:
- Process: 'Receive Ticket' -> 'Triage Priority' -> 'Assign Agent' -> 'Resolve Issue' -> 'Close Ticket'
- Suppliers: 'End User', 'Monitoring System', 'Tier 1 Support'
- Inputs: 'Error Logs', 'User Description', 'Account Details'
- Outputs: 'Resolution Confirmation', 'Knowledge Base Article', 'CSAT Survey'
- Customers: 'End User', 'Product Manager'
Save the diagram to /home/ga/Documents/help_desk_sipoc.eddx and export it to /home/ga/Documents/help_desk_sipoc.png.
